productDisplayName: Puma Women Nouli Lo Ripstop Black Casual Shoes
description: Flash back to the 80s with bold stripes so prevalent on this Nouli Lo shoes from puma. The leather and synthetic upper ensure durability, as does the rubber sole. Look hip in this fresh sneaker from puma. The fun look sneakers are very lightweight since part of the upper and the tongue are nylon which makes for an interesting feel on your feet.UpperNylon, leather and synthetic upper for maximum durabilityLace up system ensures customised FitLightly padded tongue and collar for extremely snug fitBrand tab stitched to the heel cupMidsoleTextile lining with cushioned sole for all day comfortLightweight phylon midsole for great feelOutsoleDurable textured rubber outsole with Leaping cat logo embossedshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine washKeep leather shiny with a branded leather conditionerStore shoes away from sunlight
